docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARTOK, KRISTEN V. AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, MELVIN IND/DBA AERO TRAVEL GROUP
